stories.headline: Mass UK protests demand country back from elites

perspectives.label: Conservative
perspectives.body: We want our country back . Millions are in attendance

perspectives.label: Independent
perspectives.body: The thousands of British people imprisoned merely for social media posts or speaking their mind need to be released! No more prison island!!

perspectives.label: Democrat
perspectives.body: Panic will be setting in for the elite. There's no stopping what has started.

stories.headline: PM Modi addresses BRICS summit on global cooperation

perspectives.label: Conservative
perspectives.body: BRICS has emerged as an important platform for advancing cooperation among emerging economies and giving voice to the aspirations of the Global South.

perspectives.label: Independent
perspectives.body: PM MODI WARNS WORLD MAY FACE “DECADE OF DISASTERS” AMID WARS, ENERGY CRISIS, AND INFLATION RISKS

perspectives.label: Democrat
perspectives.body: This is totally false. Not an iota of truth in this. There is no question of putting such restrictions on foreign travel.

stories.headline: Today marks the 78th anniversary of the Nakba

perspectives.label: Conservative
perspectives.body: To the Nakba glorifiers: The Nakba was the result of the Arab rejection of the UN Partition Plan & decision to launch war to annihilate the State of Israel. You can't start war, openly vow to “throw the Jews into the sea,” and then pretend being the victim of the conflict you started. The real forgotten victims are the 850,000 Jewish refugees expelled from Arab countries at the same time.

perspectives.label: Independent
perspectives.body: Today marks the 78th anniversary of the Nakba (catastrophe), during which more than 750,000 Palestinians were expelled and over 400 villages were destroyed to establish the State of Israel.

perspectives.label: Democrat
perspectives.body: I’m a 4th generation Palestinian, and the Nakba has never ended. They’ve made sure that every new generation of Palestinians watches a live-streamed genocide in real time, just to keep their pedophilic little state alive.

stories.headline: Trump faces calls to ban stock trading by President, VP and Congress amid insider trading allegations

perspectives.label: Conservative
perspectives.body: 🚨 NOW: President Trump just posted this BANGER of Greg Gutfeld mic dropping Jessica Tarlov! TARLOV: Trump made $3 billion in a YEAR! GUTFELD: "I know this is going to blow your mind. He was a BILLIONAIRE and a businessman before he was president, unlike Obama! [...] A DEMOCRAT gets into power and then GETS rich. Trump WAS rich before he got there and he's actually making LESS money!" "So your OBSESSION over his 'profiting' is a DELUSION!"

perspectives.label: Independent
perspectives.body: “WE NEED TO LET THEM DO INSIDER TRADING TO FEED THEIR FAMILIES” That was the actual argument just made in defense of politicians trading stocks. Members of Congress make $174,000 a year. The median American income is roughly $63,000. (3x less) Meanwhile the federal minimum wage is $7.25 an hour… also unchanged since 2009.

perspectives.label: Democrat
perspectives.body: Ban stock trading by the President. Ban stock trading by the Vice President. Ban stock trading by members of Congress. End the corruption.

perspectives.label: Conservative
perspectives.body: .@VP: "We don’t really know how bad the fraud problem is because until Donald Trump became president, nobody actually took a serious look at it... What we do know is that lot of Americans are being taken advantage of, and whatever the scale is, it’s big enough to really matter."

stories.headline: Cartoonist comments on Joe Rogan's advice circle and Theo Von.
stories.body: Rogan's circle are like those friends who try to offer advice but none of them have it together, they're just spiraling down at different altitudes. Best thing to do is spend time with the Lord and let Him rebuild us. Like CS Lewis wrote, when we're lost, the best way back onto the road is to make a u-turn

stories.headline: OpenAI fixes GPT-5.5 capability issues in Codex
stories.body:
We found and fixed two issues that could explain this degradation of the capability of GPT-5.5 in Codex over the last ~ 48 hours. 

We are monitoring over the coming hours to fully confirm and I will reset usage limits this evening.

Apologies and now is the time for /fast maxxing.

stories.headline: Innovation stems from production as per Palantir CTO on Google paper origins
stories.body:
Google's "Attention is All You Need" paper came from trying to get a 3% gain in Google Translate.

Innovation is a consequence of production. "If you don't make the thing, you cede your opportunity to innovate on the thing."

~ Palantir's CTO @ssankar
